Welcome back to Part 2 of our ultimate GTA 5 Mod adventure! In this action-packed episode, things get absolutely chaotic as the giant King Kong goes head-to-head with the terrifying Siren Head in an epic monster battle.
​Watch as Franklin unleashes total mayhem with a heavy minigun to survive this brutal clash of titans in Los Santos. Will King Kong destroy Siren Head, or will the creepy siren monster reign supreme?
​If you love GTA 5 gameplay, monster mods, and high-intensity boss fights, make sure to smash that like button, leave a comment, and subscribe for more epic gaming videos!
